subject: fix(content): prevent freeform help text from being squashed on mobile
body:
MiniCellGrid used w-full on mobile which consumed all flex space,
leaving no room for the "Cell N" label and hint text beside it.
Changed to a fixed 120px width at all breakpoints and wrapped in a
shrink-0 container so the text area always has room.

Tags: ui, content, mobile
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: content-editing
Semver: patch
